release_notes: - **Agent Profiles** — per-session agent personas (Hacker, Builder, Planner, Reviewer, Default) with dynamic avatar switching. Create custom profiles via interactive agent session. Built-in Hacker profile with full offensive/defensive security toolkit.
upgrade_notes: RUN ONBOARD AFTER THE UPDATE /n Restart the WebUI or Docker stack after upgrading. Profile templates are auto-synced on startup.

changes.note: New: ProfileManager for profile CRUD with avatar support
Profile-aware SOUL.md loading and cache keying
Profile API routes and startup sync
sync_profiles() for startup template sync with manifest merge
